title: Bad Piggies Music Disc
description: Replaces cat music disc with bad piggies
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EgAOqt8I5ac" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This resource pack swaps out the default "Cat" music disc track with the iconic Bad Piggies theme from Rovio's Bad Piggies. When you obtain and play the Cat disc in a jukebox, you'll hear the Bad Piggies melody instead of the vanilla track, no mods required; it works purely as a resource pack.

Also you might have to unzip the resourcepack in your resourcepacks folder to see the png lol

**Versions Supported!!!**
- 1.6.4
- 1.7.10
- 1.8.9
- 1.12.2
- 1.16.5
- 1.18.2
- 1.19.2
- 1.20.1
- 1.20.4
- 1.21.1
- 1.21.11
- 26.1
  
And more in the foreseeable future

Pig
